description.ko: AURA-7은 첨단 기술과 자연스러운 생물학적 형태 사이의 매끄러운 교차점을 탐구하며, 데이터를 살아 숨 쉬는 에너지의 흐름으로 시각화합니다.
description.en: AURA-7 explores the seamless intersection between advanced technology and natural biological forms, visualizing data as a living, breathing stream of energy.

prompt: Cinematic macro shot of fluid iridescent liquid merging with bioluminescent neural fibers, elegant organic curves, rhythmic motion blur, soft glowing ethereal light, high-tech organic hybrid aesthetic, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic textures.
